title: Leveraging FPOs for Women’s Livelihoods
description: Women play a crucial role in agricultural value chains but often have limited access to markets, services, and decision-making within farmer producer organisations. This study examines whether women-centric FPOs deliver better outcomes for women members compared to mixed-gender FPOs, drawing on primary data from across four FPOs in Uttar Pradesh. Results show that women in women-centric FPOs report significantly higher social empowerment and composite index scores. However, income improvements,
